title: List converter should ignore empty comma-separated items
body: When a list argument is passed as a comma-separated string with extra commas, Radicli currently attempts to convert empty items. For example, a CLI option annotated as `List[int]` should parse the value `"1,,2,"` as `[1, 2]` instead of raising an error for the empty segments. Please update the list conversion helper and add a regression test in `radicli/tests/test_util.py`.
